channel.title: Hiring on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Hiring on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Hiring People
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about hiring people.

item.title: My Worst Job Interview
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my worst job interview.

item.title: Job Interview Tests

item.title: Job Interview Questions
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about job interview questions.
